name: Wheat Germ Gems
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a mixing bowl.
2. Mix at low speed until well mixed.
3. Chill the dough.
4. Roll into 1-inch balls.
5. Roll each ball in wheat germ.
6. Place on a cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350°F for 12 to 15 minutes.
- Each serving consists of 1 bread and 1 fat component.
- Calories per serving: 109
- Cholesterol (cho): 12
- Protein (pro): 2
- Fat (fat): 6
Each serving contains approximately 3/4 teaspoon of sugar, equivalent to 13 calories from sugar.
